---
name: Feature request
about: Suggest a new capability or improvement
title: "[FR] <short description>"
labels: enhancement
assignees: ''
---

## Problem / Problema

<!-- What does the current /aprende NOT do well? What pain point are you trying to solve? -->
<!-- ¿Qué hace mal /aprende actualmente? ¿Qué dolor estás tratando de resolver? -->

## Proposed solution / Solución propuesta

<!-- What should /aprende do? Be specific: new command? new category? new flag? -->

## Alternatives considered / Alternativas consideradas

<!-- What other ways could we solve this? -->

## False-positive risk / Riesgo de falso positivo

<!-- /aprende is intentionally cautious. Could this feature introduce false positives? How would it be guarded? -->
<!-- /aprende es intencionalmente cauteloso. ¿Esta feature podría introducir falsos positivos? ¿Cómo se protegería? -->

## Bilingual impact / Impacto bilingüe

<!-- Would this need new strings? In which languages? -->

## Additional context / Contexto adicional
